title: Argus bench diagnosis
description: The structured answer every bench agent must return. Shell agents whose native output differs are normalized into this shape (normalization method reported). Free-form prose never reaches scoring; only root_cause_entities and category are scored.

scenario.description: The scenario name this diagnosis answers (metadata.name).

root_cause_entities.description: The agent's identified root-cause Kubernetes entities, scored against the scenario ground truth.

category.description: The agent's fault classification, e.g. cardinality-explosion.

confidence.description: Agent self-reported confidence. Recorded, never scored.
